title: pavonia baumliana
intro: Pavonia baumliana, also known as Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pavonia baumliana include treating various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pavonia baumliana can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
